description: Externalized provenance for the single working-tree modification applied to the tau2-bench benchmark used by the Stage-2.5b R4 confirmatory runs. This complements (does not replace) artifacts/stage2_5b/tau_snapshot_manifest.json, which already records the per-file diff and hashes.
reason: Add a ToolCall.arguments field validator (parse_string_arguments) that coerces a stringified JSON / Python-literal tool-call argument payload into a dict before pydantic validation. Some local served models (gemma4 / openai tool-call parsers) emit tool-call arguments as a JSON string rather than an object; without this coercion those calls fail to deserialize and the run is recorded as infrastructure-invalid.
effect_scope: Deserialization/parsing only. It runs at ToolCall construction time (mode='before'). It does NOT modify the tau2 evaluator, reward computation, DB checks, task definitions, or policies. The snapshot manifest confirms evaluator_changed_vs_comparison_ref=false.
reapply: cd /home/xqin5/tau2-bench && git checkout ddc66a777e520373975f15d3abec989cfe2ec371 && git apply /home/xqin5/llmlanguage/ir_mstu_stage2/artifacts/stage2_5b/benchmark_patches/tau2_message_patch.diff
